data/maps/MtPyre_6F/text.inc.MtPyre_6F_Text_1969FE: When I'm here...\nA curious power flows into me...
data/maps/MtPyre_6F/text.inc.MtPyre_6F_Text_196A4C: Perhaps the power is from the spirits\nof POKéMON in fitful sleep here...
data/maps/MtPyre_6F/text.inc.MtPyre_6F_Text_196AC9: The POKéMON at rest here...\nSometimes, they play...
